arts.ttl: French authorities expect huge number of ticketless Aston Villa fans – Plan ahead of PSG clash
arts.sum: French authorities are expecting 1,000 ticketless Aston Villa fans to flood Paris this week, but do not believe there will any trouble between rival supporters. That’s according to L’Equipe, who cover the situation today and the general calm from the French authorities over the matter. arts.ttl: PSG headhunted me after glowing reference from Aston Villa boss
arts.sum: In that time, PSG have also won 24 other cups in France and Luis Enrique’s irrepressible class of 2025 take on Aston Villa in the Champions League quarter finals this month as the bookies favourites to lift their first ever European Cup. So far in 2024-25, PSG remain undefeated domestically. Jonathan Calderwood developed a reputation as being one of the best in the business at Aston Villa, attracting the attention of the French football giants.

arts.ttl: Monchi wants player back at Aston Villa when season ends – Keeps ‘absolute control’ over future
arts.sum: Aston Villa’s Enzo Barrenechea has gradually improved for Valencia since joining them on loan on summer deadline day. He’s made 25 appearances this season and last Thursday, the midfielder stated he instantly fell in love with Los Ches. A day later, the Aston Villa man insisted he wants to continue in Spain beyond this season. Kang-in Lee was injured during South Korea’s 2026 World Cup qualifying match against Oman. The timing couldn’t have been worse for Luis Enrique and his team, who were coming off impressive victories over Liverpool and Olympique de Marseille.
